channel.title: InYourBones — Bay Area Radar (far_out)
channel.description: Curated upcoming Bay Area shows from InYourBones.

item.title: Jack White @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-09-25 03:00 — Jack White at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. Jack White's electrifying live performances and unique style make this a must-see event.

item.title: Olivia Rodrigo @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-12-12 03:00 — Olivia Rodrigo at Oakland Arena. Olivia Rodrigo is a rising pop star with a strong live reputation, making her tour highly anticipated.

item.title: Gorillaz @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-10-29 02:00 — Gorillaz at Oakland Arena. Gorillaz's innovative blend of genres and dynamic live shows promise an unforgettable experience.

item.title: Lily Allen @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-09-24 03:00 — Lily Allen at Chase Center. Lily Allen's unique blend of pop and storytelling makes her performance intriguing.

item.title: KATSEYE @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-11-20 04:00 — KATSEYE at Oakland Arena. John Summit is a prominent figure in the electronic scene, known for his engaging performances.

item.title: The Smashing Pumpkins @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-11-09 04:00 — The Smashing Pumpkins at SAP Center at San Jose. The Smashing Pumpkins' legacy and their new tour create a nostalgic yet exciting opportunity for fans.

item.title: Journey @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-11-29 03:30 — Journey at Chase Center. aespa's innovative approach to K-pop and their engaging performances make them a standout act.

item.title: LE SSERAFIM @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-09-24 02:30 — LE SSERAFIM at SAP Center at San Jose. LE SSERAFIM's rising popularity in the K-pop scene makes their performance highly anticipated.

item.title: Social Distortion @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-09-30 02:00 — Social Distortion at Fox Theater - Oakland. $uicideboy$ are known for their intense performances and strong underground following.

item.title: Rise Against @ The Masonic
item.description: 2026-10-23 02:00 — Rise Against at The Masonic. Rise Against's socially conscious lyrics and energetic shows resonate with a dedicated fanbase.

item.title: Madeon @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-10-03 03:00 — Madeon at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. Madeon's live shows are known for their immersive experience and high energy.

item.title: The Wallflowers @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-10-19 03:00 — The Wallflowers at The Fillmore. The Wallflowers' classic hits and strong live reputation make this a nostalgic event for fans.

item.title: Chance The Rapper @ The Masonic
item.description: 2026-09-23 03:00 — Chance The Rapper at The Masonic. Chance The Rapper's unique style and engaging performances make this a standout event.

item.title: Josh Garrels @ August Hall
item.description: 2026-11-05 03:00 — Josh Garrels at August Hall. Young Miko's fresh sound and growing popularity in the music scene make her performance noteworthy.

item.title: Chayanne @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-10-12 02:00 — Chayanne at Chase Center. Chayanne's vibrant performances and dedicated fanbase make his concert a lively experience.

item.title: Blondshell @ The Castro Theatre
item.description: 2026-10-18 03:00 — Blondshell at The Castro Theatre. Dermot Kennedy's emotive songwriting and powerful live presence attract a passionate audience.

item.title: My Morning Jacket @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-10-04 03:00 — My Morning Jacket at The Fillmore. My Morning Jacket's eclectic sound and strong live reputation make their shows a must-see.

item.title: Straight No Chaser @ Palace of Fine Arts
item.description: 2026-11-18 03:30 — Straight No Chaser at Palace of Fine Arts. Three Days Grace's hard-hitting rock sound and established fanbase ensure a powerful show.

item.title: Teddy Swims @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-11-11 03:00 — Teddy Swims at Chase Center.

item.title: Sondre Lerche @ The Independent
item.description: 2026-09-22 03:00 — Sondre Lerche at The Independent.
